category_sources: source_facts.description says utility to create k3s clusters on local or remote VMs; official README describes bootstrapping k3s/Kubernetes over SSH.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is k3sup; official GitHub README uses k3sup as the project name.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the primary usage documentation and includes install, join, HA, and kubeconfig examples; source_facts.homepage is k3sup.dev.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/alexellis/k3sup, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies k3s cluster creation; official README says the tool uses SSH to install k3s and fetch kubeconfig; current_curation.tags includes cli.
